feed.title: AO3 - Jason Todd/Reader (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Jason Todd/Reader on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Star that Wouldn't Die
entry.summary:
Author: ShadDork

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 82,247Chapters: 20/29Kudos: 561

Summary: Jason Todd forgot a lot of things after the lazarus pit's putrid green waters helped restore him back to life. Most of it was unimportant information, things that he didn't need to worry about, after all, he could always relearn names, smells, and re-read books. Lost memories weren't as easy to deal with the loss of, but he could always make new ones. The memories that remained were largely traumatic, and the others were slowly being uncovered as time passed. He wished that Dick hadn't said that name, your name. Reigniting feelings and memories. Guilt was already a large part of his existence, and this new guilt about forgetting you entirely was just making everything worse. He shouldn't track you down in case it accidentally put you in danger. But he wanted to make sure that you were okay. It was a battle he lost against himself. As memories he thought were long lost start to return, can he continue to be in your life without dragging you down with him? Can he be in your life without you knowing who he is? He doesn't know, but he wants to try.

entry.title: ‘Til Death
entry.summary:
Author: eloqxnce

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,029Chapters: 1/7Kudos: 11

Summary: Overwhelmed by the publicized loss of Bruce and Alfred, and unable to bear the added weight of your untimely death, Jason Todd does the unthinkable; he goes to your gravesite, retrieves your corpse, and brings you to the pit.

entry.title: The House hunger built
entry.summary:
Author: FearTheHime

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 94,031Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 550

Summary: "Of course I eat people, I mean...It's not something I would broadcast since it's...well Gotham and they began to make a phad about it because the citizens are brilliantly...stupid."Bodies are piling up, whatever is left. Families; different backgrounds, different ethnics, religions, looks are being eaten and whatever is left into a master piece. Some sort of art with the remains and everyone was losing time and leads to find out who has been feasting upon Gotham citizens. Jason however, knew of a Cannibal that he totally never mentioned to Bruce. It's not Jason's fault he died before revealing his darkest discovery and that discovery is in the form of a boy he had left behind. [M/N] [L/N]; Mortitan, brilliant, a chef of his own making and conisear of flesh.All Jason needed to do is sweeten the deal in a way that drives all people, after all at the end of the day {M/N] is human after all."Besides..it's people...they are literally born every day..so who cares if a few of them...just disapear once in a while?"

entry.title: Strawberry Waffles
entry.summary:
Author: lushescape

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 54,105Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 974

Summary: “Like a date?” You ask in a near whisper. Jason looks like he's been electrocuted but slowly he nods his head twice. “Yeah. A date. You and me, the school dance.” Oh. Your heart feels like it's beating so fast it's going to stop at any second. But you nod, your face warm, and there's no way you can stop yourself from smiling now. “Um, y- yeah.” You stammer before clearing your throat softly. “Yes.” You say, more confident in your answer. “Yes, I would.. love to go with you. On a date. To the dance.” Or Jason Todd becomes a girl dad after dying and coming back to life

entry.title: Needles don't scare me
entry.summary:
Author: darkdustyblue

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,435Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Jason is studying Philosophy in Literature, Siena is a Criminal Justice major. Both have family trauma, both hate life, both decide to become friends. Jason is struggling with his mental health and navigating his first civilian friendship. Siena is disowned, moved from Italy to Gotham on a whim. She is a Robin die hard fan. Jason has a complicated relationship with his family. They both need someone to lean on and help them carry their respective burdens. Not technically Reader as it's a character but can be read as self insert due to limited and easy to skip character descriptions.

entry.title: An Ode to reunions
entry.summary:
Author: Fung1cida

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,644Chapters: 3/5Kudos: 8

Summary: She had thought, all those years, that she was just crazy. The doctors explained so. Schizophrenia tends to runs in the families. She can’t run faster than that. But if it was only that, just bad hallucinations, why did Jason die at the end? He was just another lost kid in the same street she lived at. She still lives there. If it was just mommy’s illness, why did she feel him die in her own bones? Even worse: why did she feel him come back to life?Or, Red Hood meets a probably neurotic woman obssesed with the idea she could have stopped his death. Jason Todd comes back to life and it feels like it alwats did in the begining: forceful, miserable, and confusing.

entry.title: Getting Around Gotham, or: Five Drabble Trysts with Batfam Men, and One 3500 Word Epilogue About How You All Realized It
entry.summary:
Author: gone (relocation)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 400Chapters: 4/6Kudos: 17

Summary: A fresh arrival in Gotham and trying to meet new people, you find yourself entangled with five different men, unaware that they are all connected, just as they are unaware of each other's connection to you, until you all end up at one party. (In your defence, they all had different surnames.) - Updating Mondays and Fridays- Inspired by every time I've thought "What if someone dated everyone in the Batfam, and never realized it because they all have different surnames?"- Written for the characters in general, most recently (but certainly not only) influenced by WFA- Only Jason got outright smut, sorry Dick et al.- Drabbles can pretty much be enjoyed separately, but they are meant to be read together with the longer epilogue.- Titled edited. Originally 3300 word epilogue but decide to go for a 3500 for a nice clean 4k total.

entry.title: distraction
entry.summary:
Author: dudleykins

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,483Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 28

Summary: You squinted your eyes at him. "I'm on to your little tricks, you know." "What tricks?" He pulled you flush, mouth finding yours. His kiss was playful, slightly tugging on your lower lip. You were going to protest. You really were. But when his tongue found its way into your mouth, languidly stroking back and forth, whatever you were going to say seemed far less important. or dermatillomania is no fun. but when jason kisses you — you hardly remember the pain anymore.

entry.title: Suffocate
entry.summary:
Author: AristoMuse

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,063Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 43

Summary: The moment the first explosion happened, Jason's heart stopped. Because you had left the apartment in tears— tears that he had caused— and now he had no idea where you were.   (A companion piece/slight prequel to "Breathe It In")
